## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on reporting blockers and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/fSTShLx5knu6mC51Zd91xyi_GPcm_Tna?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Reporting Blocked:** Full pipeline reporting is blocked because the data import is missing key fields (e.g., `lead score`, `deal data`). Jesse will investigate the workflow failure.](https://fathom.video/share/fSTShLx5knu6mC51Zd91xyi_GPcm_Tna?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
  - [**Content Strategy Shift:** The team will pivot from a tactical "wireframing" cluster to a strategic "website structure" angle, as clients search for solutions to disjointed content, not the tool itself.](https://fathom.video/share/fSTShLx5knu6mC51Zd91xyi_GPcm_Tna?tab=summary&timestamp=983.0)
  - [**Airtable Workflow Upgrade:** A new Airtable interface and automations are launching by early next week to simplify Webstacks' content approvals and improve visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/fSTShLx5knu6mC51Zd91xyi_GPcm_Tna?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)

## Topics

### Reporting Blockers

  - [Full pipeline reporting is blocked because the data import is missing key fields required for aggregation and charting.](https://fathom.video/share/fSTShLx5knu6mC51Zd91xyi_GPcm_Tna?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
  - [**Missing Fields:**](https://fathom.video/share/fSTShLx5knu6mC51Zd91xyi_GPcm_Tna?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)
      - [`deal data`](https://fathom.video/share/fSTShLx5knu6mC51Zd91xyi_GPcm_Tna?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)
      - [`date added`](https://fathom.video/share/fSTShLx5knu6mC51Zd91xyi_GPcm_Tna?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)
      - [`lead score` (needed to aggregate data into charts)](https://fathom.video/share/fSTShLx5knu6mC51Zd91xyi_GPcm_Tna?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [Jessalynn shared a doc detailing the required fields and the current import status.](https://fathom.video/share/fSTShLx5knu6mC51Zd91xyi_GPcm_Tna?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)

### Content Strategy: Wireframing vs. Website Structure

  - [A proposed "wireframing" content cluster was reviewed as a short-term tactic to fill content gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/fSTShLx5knu6mC51Zd91xyi_GPcm_Tna?tab=summary&timestamp=782.0)
  - [**Problem:** The keyword "wireframing" is too tactical. Clients search for strategic solutions to disjointed websites, not the tool itself.](https://fathom.video/share/fSTShLx5knu6mC51Zd91xyi_GPcm_Tna?tab=summary&timestamp=983.0)
  - [**Client Pain Point:** Websites with repetitive content across pages (e.g., product, features, solutions) that fails to guide users toward a conversion goal.](https://fathom.video/share/fSTShLx5knu6mC51Zd91xyi_GPcm_Tna?tab=summary&timestamp=1284.0)
  - [**Strategic Pivot:** Reframe content around "website structure" and "user journey mapping" to address this core problem.](https://fathom.video/share/fSTShLx5knu6mC51Zd91xyi_GPcm_Tna?tab=summary&timestamp=983.0)
  - [**Short-Term Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/fSTShLx5knu6mC51Zd91xyi_GPcm_Tna?tab=summary&timestamp=1714.0)
      - [**Goal:** Bridge the content gap while the larger blog audit is completed.](https://fathom.video/share/fSTShLx5knu6mC51Zd91xyi_GPcm_Tna?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)
      - [**Action:** Clean up the "considering" topics in Airtable to find relevant, non-stale ideas for the next 1–2 weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/fSTShLx5knu6mC51Zd91xyi_GPcm_Tna?tab=summary&timestamp=1714.0)

### Airtable Workflow Improvements

  - [A new Airtable interface will launch by early next week to streamline the content approval process for Webstacks.](https://fathom.video/share/fSTShLx5knu6mC51Zd91xyi_GPcm_Tna?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)
  - [**Features:**](https://fathom.video/share/fSTShLx5knu6mC51Zd91xyi_GPcm_Tna?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)
      - [Simplified view showing only relevant fields for approval.](https://fathom.video/share/fSTShLx5knu6mC51Zd91xyi_GPcm_Tna?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)
      - [Automated notifications for publishing status changes.](https://fathom.video/share/fSTShLx5knu6mC51Zd91xyi_GPcm_Tna?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
      - [Direct links to published content for easy review.](https://fathom.video/share/fSTShLx5knu6mC51Zd91xyi_GPcm_Tna?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Jessalynn will send a Loom walkthrough to introduce the new interface.](https://fathom.video/share/fSTShLx5knu6mC51Zd91xyi_GPcm_Tna?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jesse:** Investigate the data import workflow to fix missing reporting fields.](https://fathom.video/share/fSTShLx5knu6mC51Zd91xyi_GPcm_Tna?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
  - [**Jakub:**](https://fathom.video/share/fSTShLx5knu6mC51Zd91xyi_GPcm_Tna?tab=summary&timestamp=1714.0)
      - [Clean up the "considering" topics in Airtable with Jessalynn to find short-term content.](https://fathom.video/share/fSTShLx5knu6mC51Zd91xyi_GPcm_Tna?tab=summary&timestamp=1714.0)
      - [Export the full list of lower-funnel wireframing topics for review.](https://fathom.video/share/fSTShLx5knu6mC51Zd91xyi_GPcm_Tna?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [**Jessalynn:** Send the Airtable interface invite and Loom walkthrough by early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/fSTShLx5knu6mC51Zd91xyi_GPcm_Tna?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)
